positive: Whimsical storybook illustration of a group of friendly forest animals: a sleepy fox, a wise owl, and tiny bioluminescent mushrooms. Soft watercolor painting style, ethereal lighting, deep forest setting, gentle pastel color scheme, highly detailed, narrative art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, oil paint, grunge
